title: Principais Filiais por Compras em 2026
sql: SELECT "NMFILIAL" AS filial, "UF", SUM("TOTAL") AS compras FROM "NFE" WHERE "ANO" = 2026 GROUP BY "NMFILIAL", "UF" ORDER BY compras DESC LIMIT 500
question: top filiais por compras e por UF em 2026

title: Top 500 Filiais por Compras em 2026
sql: SELECT "CDFILIAL" AS codigo_filial, "NMFILIAL" AS nome_filial, "UF", "NMEMP" AS empresa, "FI.NEGOCIO" AS negocio, SUM("TOTAL") AS total_compras FROM "NFE" WHERE "ANO" = 2026 AND "FI.NEGOCIO" <> '_MATRIZ' GROUP BY "CDFILIAL", "NMFILIAL", "UF", "NMEMP", "FI.NEGOCIO" ORDER BY total_compras DESC LIMIT 500
question: SELECT "CDFILIAL" AS codigo_filial, "NMFILIAL" AS nome_filial, "UF", "NMEMP" AS empresa, "FI.NEGOCIO" AS negocio, SUM("TOTAL") AS total_compras FROM "NFE" WHERE "ANO" = 2026 AND "FI.NEGOCIO" <> '_MATRIZ' GROUP BY "CDFILIAL", "NMFILIAL", "UF", "NMEMP", "FI.NEGOCIO" ORDER BY total_compras DESC LIMIT 500

title: Top 500 Fornecedores por Categoria e Gastos Totais
sql: SELECT "CAT3", "FANTASIA_OFICIAL" AS fornecedor, SUM("TOTAL") AS spend FROM "NFE" GROUP BY "CAT3", "FANTASIA_OFICIAL" ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 500

title: Análise de Compras Totais por UF e Mês desde 2025
sql: SELECT "UF", "MESANO", SUM("TOTAL") AS compra_total FROM "NFE" WHERE "ANO" >= 2025 GROUP BY "UF", "MESANO" ORDER BY "MESANO" DESC, "UF" LIMIT 500
question: grafico de compra total por uf por mes desde 2025

title: Análise de Preços de Produtos Estocáveis em Maio de 2026
sql: WITH pmp_data AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "UF", "PMP_ID", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD" FROM "INFLAÇÃO" WHERE "MESANO" = '2026/05' AND "CAT2" = 'I1 - ESTOCAVEIS' ), pmp_pivot AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'MA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "MA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RN' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RN", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PB' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PB", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PI' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PI", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'DF' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "DF", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SP' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SP", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RJ' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RJ", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'ES' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "ES", MAX("POS_PROD") AS "POS_PROD", MAX("CURVA_PROD") AS "CURVA_PROD" FROM pmp_data GROUP BY "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL" ) SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD", "PE", "MA", "RN", "PB", "PI", "SE", "PA", "DF", "SP", "RJ", "ES" FROM pmp_pivot ORDER BY "POS_PROD" ASC LIMIT 500

question:
WITH pmp_data AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "UF", "PMP_ID", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD" FROM "INFLAÇÃO" WHERE "MESANO" = '2026/05' AND "CAT1" = 'I - INSUMOS' ), pmp_pivot AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'MA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "MA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RN' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RN", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PB' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PB", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PI' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PI", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'DF' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "DF", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SP' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SP", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RJ' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RJ", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'ES' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "ES", MAX("POS_PROD") AS "POS_PROD", MAX("CURVA_PROD") AS "CURVA_PROD" FROM pmp_data GROUP BY "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL" ) SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD", "PE", "MA", "RN", "PB", "PI", "SE", "PA", "DF", "SP", "RJ", "ES" FROM pmp_pivot ORDER BY "POS_PROD" ASC LIMIT 500

title: Análise de Preços de Insumos por Estado em Maio de 2026
sql: WITH pmp_data AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "UF", "PMP_ID", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD" FROM "INFLAÇÃO" WHERE "MESANO" = '2026/05' AND "CAT1" = 'I - INSUMOS' ), pmp_pivot AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'MA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "MA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RN' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RN", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PB' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PB", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PI' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PI", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'DF' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "DF", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SP' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SP", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RJ' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RJ", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'ES' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "ES", MAX("POS_PROD") AS "POS_PROD", MAX("CURVA_PROD") AS "CURVA_PROD" FROM pmp_data GROUP BY "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL" ) SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD", "PE", "MA", "RN", "PB", "PI", "SE", "PA", "DF", "SP", "RJ", "ES" FROM pmp_pivot ORDER BY "POS_PROD" ASC LIMIT 500

question:
+ Novo
WITH pmp_data AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "UF", "PMP_ID", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD" FROM "INFLAÇÃO" WHERE "MESANO" = '2026/05' AND "CAT1" = 'I - INSUMOS' ), pmp_pivot AS ( SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'MA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "MA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RN' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RN", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PB' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PB", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PI' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PI", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SE' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SE", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'PA' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "PA", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'DF' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "DF", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'SP' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "SP", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'RJ' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "RJ", MAX(CASE WHEN "UF" = 'ES' THEN "PMP_ID" ELSE NULL END) AS "ES", MAX("POS_PROD") AS "POS_PROD", MAX("CURVA_PROD") AS "CURVA_PROD" FROM pmp_data GROUP BY "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL" ) SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD", "PE", "MA", "RN", "PB", "PI", "SE", "PA", "DF", "SP", "RJ", "ES" FROM pmp_pivot ORDER BY "POS_PROD" ASC LIMIT 500

title: Preços de Insumos dos Últimos 6 Meses por Posição
sql: WITH pmp_data AS ( SELECT "CDPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "CAT1", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD", "MESANO", "PMP_1", "PMP_2", "PMP_3", "PMP_4", "PMP_5", "PMP_6" FROM "PMP_PROD_INF_12" WHERE "CAT1" = 'I - INSUMOS' AND "MESANO" >= '2026/01' AND "MESANO" <= '2026/06' ) SELECT "NMPRODUTO_OFICIAL", "CAT1", "POS_PROD", "CURVA_PROD", "PMP_1", "PMP_2", "PMP_3", "PMP_4", "PMP_5", "PMP_6" FROM pmp_data ORDER BY "POS_PROD" ASC LIMIT 500

title: Inflação Média de Insumos em Maio de 2026
sql: SELECT AVG("PERC_INF_PROD_PMP") AS inflacao_media_insumos FROM "INFLAÇÃO" WHERE "CAT1" = 'I - INSUMOS' AND "MESANO" = '2026/05' AND "PERC_INF_PROD_PMP" IS NOT NULL
question: me dê a inflação média de insumos em maio de 2026

title: Total de Linhas na Tabela NFE
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_linhas FROM "NFE"
question: quantas linhas tem NFE

title: Tendência Mensal de Compras
sql: SELECT "MESANO" AS mesano, SUM("TOTAL") AS spend FROM "NFE" GROUP BY "MESANO" ORDER BY "MESANO"

title: SUP por GEO — Norte e Nordeste
sql: SELECT "UF" AS uf, SUM("TOTAL") AS spend FROM "NFE" WHERE "UF" IN ('AC','AM','AP','PA','RO','RR','TO','AL','BA','CE','MA','PB','PE','PI','RN','SE') GROUP BY "UF" ORDER BY spend DESC

title: SUP por GEO — Sul e Sudeste
sql: SELECT "UF" AS uf, SUM("TOTAL") AS spend FROM "NFE" WHERE "UF" IN ('ES','MG','RJ','SP','PR','RS','SC','DF','GO','MS','MT') GROUP BY "UF" ORDER BY spend DESC

title: Impacto Nacional por Mês
sql: SELECT "MESANO" AS mesano, SUM("IMP_COT") AS imp_cot FROM "NFE" WHERE "IMP_COT" > 0 GROUP BY "MESANO" ORDER BY "MESANO"

title: Impacto por UF
sql: SELECT "UF" AS uf, SUM("IMP_COT") AS imp_cot FROM "NFE" WHERE "IMP_COT" > 0 GROUP BY "UF" ORDER BY imp_cot DESC

title: Exposição R$ por Mês
sql: SELECT "MESANO" AS mesano, SUM("SOMA_INF_ID_PMP") AS exposicao_rs FROM "INFLAÇÃO" GROUP BY "MESANO" ORDER BY "MESANO"

title: Inflação Nacional por Categoria
sql: SELECT "CAT2" AS cat2, AVG("PERC_INF_ID_PMP") AS inflacao_media_pct, SUM("SOMA_INF_ID_PMP") AS exposicao_rs FROM "INFLAÇÃO" GROUP BY "CAT2" ORDER BY inflacao_media_pct DESC

title: Inflação por UF
sql: SELECT "UF" AS uf, AVG("PERC_INF_ID_PMP") AS inflacao_media_pct, SUM("SOMA_INF_ID_PMP") AS exposicao_rs FROM "INFLAÇÃO" GROUP BY "UF" ORDER BY inflacao_media_pct DESC

title: Aging de CP
sql: SELECT "FAIXA_DIAS" AS faixa_dias, SUM("VRATUAPAG") AS valor, COUNT(*) AS titulos FROM "CP" WHERE "STATUSPAG" = 'Em Aberto' GROUP BY "FAIXA_DIAS" ORDER BY valor DESC

title: CP por Fornecedor
sql: SELECT "NMFANTFORN" AS fornecedor, SUM("VRATUAPAG") AS cp_aberto, SUM(CASE WHEN "STATUS_VENC" = 'Vencido' THEN "VRATUAPAG" ELSE 0 END) AS cp_vencido, COUNT(*) AS titulos FROM "CP" WHERE "STATUSPAG" = 'Em Aberto' GROUP BY "NMFANTFORN" ORDER BY cp_aberto DESC LIMIT 200

title: AD por Empresa
sql: SELECT "NMEMP" AS empresa, SUM(CASE WHEN "STATUS_CONCILIACAO" != 'CONCILIADO' THEN "VALOR_FINAL" ELSE 0 END) AS pendente, SUM(CASE WHEN "STATUS_CONCILIACAO" = 'CONCILIADO' THEN "VALOR_FINAL" ELSE 0 END) AS conciliado FROM "AD_v3" GROUP BY "NMEMP" ORDER BY pendente DESC

title: AD por Fornecedor
sql: SELECT "NMFANTFORN" AS fornecedor, SUM(CASE WHEN "STATUS_CONCILIACAO" != 'CONCILIADO' THEN "VALOR_FINAL" ELSE 0 END) AS pendente, SUM(CASE WHEN "STATUS_CONCILIACAO" = 'CONCILIADO' THEN "VALOR_FINAL" ELSE 0 END) AS conciliado, COUNT(*) AS registros FROM "AD_v3" GROUP BY "NMFANTFORN" ORDER BY pendente DESC LIMIT 200

title: Serviços por UF
sql: SELECT "UF" AS uf, SUM("TOTAL") AS spend FROM "NFE" WHERE "CAT2" LIKE 'D5%' GROUP BY "UF" ORDER BY spend DESC

title: Fornecedores de Serviços
sql: SELECT "FANTASIA_OFICIAL" AS fornecedor, "CAT3" AS categoria, SUM("TOTAL") AS spend FROM "NFE" WHERE "CAT2" LIKE 'D5%' GROUP BY "FANTASIA_OFICIAL", "CAT3" ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 200
